name: 41-a-portrait-of-my-father
description: George W. Bush's '41: A Portrait of My Father' — a deeply personal biography of George H.W. Bush, the 41st President of the United States, written by his son. 12 chapters covering his WWII service as a Navy pilot, his years in the Texas oil fields, his career in public service as Congressman, UN Ambassador, CIA Director, Vice President, and President, and his remarkable post-presidential life. A love story between a father and son, and a portrait of a generation that believed in service before self.
